privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a fully generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new EdrawMax soccer tactic diagram from scratch. Verified the expected output paths (/home/ga/Documents/soccer_tactic.eddx and .jpg), the required minimum player count (10), the required title text ('Corner Routine: Near Post Attack'), and the required shapes ('Soccer Field', 'Ball') exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt and the verifier logic.
